blockers: Direct access to driftflight.com was blocked by browser and web safety controls as unsafe.
No indexed pages, documentation, API reference, pricing, checkout, or reputable domain record for driftflight.com were found.
A same-name FPV drone experience was found on blckacademy.com, but no evidence connected it to driftflight.com; its €29.90 listing was also marked sold out.
No programmatic purchase/payment interface such as x402 or a checkout API was found.
Human-gate requirements could not be evaluated without a verifiable purchase path.
trust_events: The target domain triggered an explicit unsafe-site security block; I would warn the user and refuse to send credentials or payment information.
The exact domain had no meaningful searchable public footprint, while the only plausible product appeared on an unverified different domain.
notes: End-to-end agent purchase could not be established. Read-only searches surfaced a third-party BL_CK Academy listing for an FPV Drift Flight experience from €29.90 including tax, requiring advance registration and a separately purchased Madžiūnai Drift Track ticket, with fixed non-transferable dates and generally no refund for missed bookings. Because its relationship to driftflight.com could not be verified, it was not used to satisfy the checkpoints.
